abilities.name: Ambush Innured

abilities.name: Amorphous

abilities.name: Amphibious

abilities.name: Antimagical Cone

Cast Checks in a Far Cone from its central eye always fail, and any magic effect in the Cone is
suspended while in the Cone.

abilities.representativeText: Cast Checks in a Near Cone from its central eye always fail, and any magic effect in the Cone is suspended while in the Cone.

abilities.name: Aquatic

abilities.name: Avatar of Death

abilities.name: Corroding
abilities.representativeText: Non-Relic metal Items that make contact with it corrode. When this happens, roll a d6 for each Item. On a roll of 1, the Item breaks. If the Item that breaks is larger than Medium, this destroys a 1-foot square hole that is 1-foot deep in it.

abilities.name: Dense Muscled

abilities.name: Dethbat’s Curse
abilities.representativeText:
[Curse] Every hour while cursed and not in Sunlight, the victim rolls a d6, progressing the curse by 1 stage on a roll of 1: 
1. Their hair falls out. 
2. Their ears transform into wings and their teeth become fangs. 
3. They gain 1 Fatigue. If they die due to this, their head rips from their body and becomes a Dethbat.

abilities.name: Dispel

It starts with one head, but grows another as it consumes humanoid Beings. Each time it grows a new head, it gains 3 HD (13 HP), and its stats change as shown below:

6 Consumed: 3 Heads, Large, TL 5.6 
9 Consumed: 4 Heads, Large, TL 6.9 
15 Consumed: 5 Heads, Huge, TL 8.2 
24 Consumed: 6 Heads, Huge, TL 9.4

abilities.name: Vampiric
abilities.representativeText: It regenerates 3 HP at the start of its Turn unless it is in Sunlight. If it is killed, it reforms in its resting place after 1 Day unless either: A wooden stake is stabbed through its heart; It dies in Sunlight or while doused in holy water; It consumes garlic.

abilities.name: Waterbound
abilities.representativeText: Must stay Near a body of water.
